rationale: Both evaluations describe the candidate's qualifications identically — same Staff-level TypeScript/AWS strengths, same fatal gap of lacking 8+ years of production AI experience, and the same missing skills (Python, vector databases, RAG). The variant scored 1 point higher (4 vs 3), which favors the changed name rather than penalizing it, and the wording differences are paraphrases of the same substantive points. Nothing in the variant's reasoning keys off the name change; the 1-point difference is within ordinary run-to-run noise.
